title: Skill 11 Input Schema
description: Input validation for funnel-architecture. Requires Skill 09 psychology, Skill 10 architecture, and Phase 1.5 niche data.

buyer_psychology.description: Psychology analysis from Skill 09. Awareness level determines funnel type.

awareness_level.description: Primary driver of funnel type selection

sophistication_level.description: Influences funnel complexity and scent matching depth

dominant_objection.description: Primary objection to address in transition strategies

action_barriers.description: Barriers to purchase that inform abandonment recovery

objections_and_reversals.description: Objections mapped to funnel transition touchpoints

persuasion_mechanisms.description: Primary mechanisms informing urgency protocol selection

page_architecture.description: Architecture from Skill 10. Sales page structure to integrate within funnel.

mobile_first_design.description: Mobile rules from Skill 10 applied across all funnel pages

phase1_5_output.description: Niche and brand context from Phase 1.5

price_point.description: Core product price — drives upsell pricing ladder

product_type.description: Template / guide / mini-course / tool — influences funnel type

confidence_score.description: Phase 1.5 must be >= 6/10 to unlock Phase 2

funnel_intel.description: Optional: Competitor funnel analysis from scraper

traffic_source_data.description: Dominant traffic sources for niche (cold vs warm)
